description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: dependencies, build_apk, and deploy_appetize. In the dependencies stage add an install_dependencies job using the node:8.17.0 Docker image, marked interruptible, that runs `npm install` then `npx jetify` and publishes the node_modules/ directory as an artifact. In the build_apk stage add a build_job that uses the reactnativecommunity/react-native-android image, depends on install_dependencies, is interruptible, and executes the following commands in order: `apt-get update`, `apt-get install -y gettext-base`, `mv app/config/keys.sample.js app/config/keys.js`, `touch ./android/app/google-services.json && echo $GOOGLE_SERVICES > ./android/app/google-services.json`, `touch ./android/app/keystore.jks && echo $KEYSTORE | base64 --decode > ./android/app/keystore.jks`, `chmod +x ./scripts/fixes.sh`, `./scripts/fixes.sh`, `chmod +x ./scripts/set_keys.sh`, `./scripts/set_keys.sh`, `sh generate-gradle-properties.sh > ./android/gradle.properties`, `rm -rf android/app/build`, `echo fs.inotify.max_user_watches=524288 | tee -a /etc/sysctl.conf && sysctl -p`, `cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease --stacktrace --no-daemon`, `mv ./app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk ../app-release.apk`, and `cd .. && touch req.json && echo {\"url\":\"$CI_JOB_URL/artifacts/raw/app-release.apk\",\"platform\":\"android\"} > req.json`; it stores app-release.apk and req.json as artifacts. In the deploy_appetize stage add a deploy_appetize_job that depends on build_job, is interruptible, and runs `curl -s -X POST -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -d @req.json https://$APPETIZE_API@api.appetize.io/v1/apps/$APPETIZE_KEY > response.json` followed by `sh ./scripts/validate-appetize.sh`. No additional caches, services, or rules are defined, and the pipeline uses environment variables $GOOGLE_SERVICES, $KEYSTORE, $CI_JOB_URL, $APPETIZE_API, and $APPETIZE_KEY.
